nasb.text: In that day man will have regard for his Maker And his eyes will look to the Holy One of Israel.

esv.text: In that day man will look to his Maker, and his eyes will look on the Holy One of Israel.

cnv.text: 到那日，人必仰望他們的創造主， 他們必親眼看見以色列的聖者。

ccb.text: 到那日，人们必仰望他们的创造主，向以色列的圣者求助。

csbs.text: 到那日， 人必仰望那造他们的主， 他们的眼睛必注视以色列的圣者。
